base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of energy_bars — a ui from 1988 mega man 2. HP + weapon-energy bars with per-weapon colored pixels. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: HP + weapon-energy bars with per-weapon colored pixels
